zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Legh於1162年出生在英國英格蘭爾希 萊時，他的父親Sir Hamon de la Legh Crompton22歲，母親Agnes de Bohun20歲。他和Margery Hatton至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Legh was born in 1162, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hamon de la Legh Crompton, was 22 and his mother, Agnes de Bohun, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Margery Hatton. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Legh est né en 1162, à High Legh, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hamon de la Legh Crompton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Bohun, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Margery Hatton. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Leghが1162年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグで生まれた時，父Sir Hamon de la Legh Cromptonは22歳，母Agnes de Bohunは20歳であった。彼はMargery Hattonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Legh(이)가 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 히 레그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hamon de la Legh Crompton(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Bohun(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Margery Hatton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Legh родился в 1162 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hamon de la Legh Crompton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Bohun, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Margery Hatton. Он умер в его родном городе.
